texto: If you take a band like Nirvana, their biggest hits are structurally the same as even a hair metal band's biggest hits. The structure's not different - the attitude was different. Except it really wasn't. It seemed a little more human.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Buzz Osborne: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “If you take a band like Nirvana, their biggest hits are structurally the same as even a hair meta…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, hair, you pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de you e human.

texto: I want to travel around the country and make my living playing music. I also try to behave in a way that I would appreciate as a music fan. That's how we conduct ourselves, be it in writing music or playing it live.
explicacao: Citação de Buzz Osborne sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I want to travel around the country and make my living playing music. I also try to behave in a w…” articula vida, music, writing em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como viagem e writing.

frase_original: I want to travel around the country and make my living playing music. I also try to behave in a way that I would appreciate as a music fan. That's how we conduct ourselves, be it in writing music or playing it live.
